description: A creature artist needs to prototype fur for a stylized animal character. In the provided Blender scene, place a Suzanne (Monkey) mesh at (0, 0, 1.5) and ensure the BaseCube is not obstructing the view. Apply a Hair particle system to Suzanne with at least 5,000 emission particles, a hair length of approximately 0.15 units, and Simple children with a render amount of at least 50. Create and assign a warm brown/orange material using a Principled BSDF (constraints: R > G > B, R >= 0.4, B <= 0.2). Save the rendered image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/fur_render.png and the project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/fur_setup.blend.
